# Requirements Checklist: Voetbalpoule & Voorspelsysteem

**Purpose**: Validate whether the feature requirements are complete, clear, consistent, measurable, and ready for implementation across participant, admin, and public standings flows.
**Created**: 2026-03-15
**Feature**: `C:\Github\poule_ai\specs\001-voetbal-poule\spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements.

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 Are requirements specified for every active prediction section, including match predictions, knock-out selections, and bonus questions? [Completeness, Spec §FR-008, FR-021, FR-049]
- [ ] CHK002 Are participant account requirements complete enough to distinguish registration, authentication, and competition participation states? [Completeness, Spec §FR-002, FR-052]
- [ ] CHK003 Are administrator requirements complete for competition lifecycle management, including activation, section/rule changes, payments, enrollment, and maintenance actions? [Completeness, Spec §FR-005, FR-028, FR-036, FR-047, FR-052]
- [ ] CHK004 Are public-information requirements complete for landing pages, result pages, main standings, and sub-competition standings? [Completeness, Spec §FR-001, FR-030, FR-031, FR-038]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK005 Is the boundary between “active”, “open for submission”, “closed”, and read-only states explicitly defined in the requirements? [Clarity, Spec §FR-010, FR-026]
- [ ] CHK006 Is “zichtbaar markeren” for unpaid participants clarified with exact contexts and expected information density? [Clarity, Spec §FR-037, Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK007 Are the enrollment requirements explicit about who may add a participant to a competition and through which allowed workflow? [Clarity, Spec §FR-052, Story 2]
- [ ] CHK008 Are the maintenance-workflow requirements precise about which actions are available without CLI/SSH and under what conditions? [Clarity, Spec §FR-047, Story 2]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK009 Do the participant submission requirements align with the constitution rule that predictions become read-only after the deadline? [Consistency, Spec §FR-026, Constitution §Technische randvoorwaarden]
- [ ] CHK010 Are bonus-question requirements consistent between section configuration, participant submission, validation, and scoring? [Consistency, Spec §FR-008, FR-012, FR-013, FR-014, FR-049, FR-050]
- [ ] CHK011 Are knock-out requirements internally consistent about round count, round order, allowed team counts, and participant validation? [Consistency, Spec §FR-017, FR-018, FR-019, FR-020, FR-023]
- [ ] CHK012 Do public-standings requirements align with snapshot and movement-indicator requirements without implying live recomputation? [Consistency, Spec §FR-032, FR-033, FR-034, FR-035]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [ ] CHK013 Can the success criteria for participant submission be objectively verified from the current wording without relying on implementer interpretation? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001, SC-002]
- [ ] CHK014 Can the admin configurability goals be objectively measured for a new tournament setup without code changes? [Measurability, Spec §SC-003, FR-005, FR-028]
- [ ] CHK015 Are the public-transparency outcomes measurable for both hoofdcompetities and sub-competities? [Measurability, Spec §SC-004, SC-005]

## Scenario Coverage

- [ ] CHK016 Are requirements documented for all primary actor flows: participant submission, admin configuration, and guest/public viewing? [Coverage, Story 1, Story 2, Story 3]
- [ ] CHK017 Are alternate flows defined for incomplete submissions, unpaid participants, empty sub-competitions, and first-time snapshots? [Coverage, Edge Cases, Spec §FR-023, FR-037]
- [ ] CHK018 Are exception-flow requirements defined for invalid CSV rows, invalid bonus entities, invalid knock-out slot counts, and forbidden post-deadline changes? [Coverage, Spec §FR-016, FR-013, FR-019, FR-026]
- [ ] CHK019 Are recovery-flow requirements clear when configuration changes invalidate existing participant data or require a new standings recalculation? [Coverage, Edge Cases, Spec §FR-029, FR-033]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK020 Does the spec define the required behavior when knock-out structure changes after predictions already exist? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-017, FR-023, Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK021 Does the spec define what must happen when a bonus question references an inactive or removed entity? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-013, Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK022 Does the spec define the expected output when no prior snapshot exists for movement comparison? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-035, Edge Cases]
- [ ] CHK023 Does the spec define how users are informed when admins change sections or scoring rules after earlier submissions? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-029, Edge Cases]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK024 Are performance requirements quantified for all critical journeys, including public standings, final submission, and recalculation? [Clarity, Plan §Technical Context]
- [ ] CHK025 Are security requirements complete for authorization, CSRF, prepared statements, and admin-only sensitive actions? [Completeness, Spec §FR-039, FR-040, FR-041, FR-047]
- [ ] CHK026 Are accessibility and responsive-behavior requirements specific enough to be reviewed objectively, or do they need more measurable criteria? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-042]
- [ ] CHK027 Are shared-hosting constraints documented clearly enough to prevent implementers from assuming queues, daemons, or framework-specific server features? [Consistency, Plan §Technical Context, Constitution §Operationale richtlijnen]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK028 Are dependencies on active competition entities, CSV import sources, and filesystem-backed logo storage explicitly documented as assumptions or requirements? [Dependency, Spec §FR-013, FR-015, FR-051, Plan §Technical Context]
- [ ] CHK029 Is the assumption that standings are snapshot-backed rather than live-aggregated stated consistently across requirements and plan notes? [Assumption, Spec §FR-032, FR-035, Plan §Technical Context]
- [ ] CHK030 Is the requirement/acceptance traceability strong enough that each major story can be mapped to specific functional requirements and measurable outcomes? [Traceability, Spec §Stories, FR-001..FR-052, SC-001..SC-006]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK031 Is the distinction between bonus-question “support” and bonus-question “admin lifecycle management” clear enough to avoid duplicated implementation scope? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-012, FR-048]
- [ ] CHK032 Are “beheerfunctionaliteit of expliciet ondersteunde import” requirements for groups, venues, and matches precise enough to avoid conflicting interpretations of mandatory scope? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-051]
- [ ] CHK033 Do the admin-maintenance requirements avoid conflict with the shared-hosting constraint against CLI-only workflows? [Consistency, Spec §FR-047, Plan §Infrastructure Layer, Constitution §Operationale richtlijnen]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Focus on requirement quality, not implementation behavior
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
